title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
